testsuite.name: practice.TestPractice
testsuite.system-out: ---Executing Suite-- ---Executing Test-- ---Executing before class-- ---Executing before method-- Login Successful ---Executing after method-- ---Executing before method-- products verified ---Executing after method-- ---Executing before method-- logout verified ---Executing after method-- ---Executing After class -- ---Executing After test-- ---Executing After suite--
